title: Mildly Spicy Malaysian Boudin Noir Noodles
description: A quick-fix Malaysian dish featuring boudin noir, nimono simmer, and bouncy qq noodles, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Cook the qq noodles according to package instructions and set aside
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional minute
Add the boudin noir and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until no longer raw, about 5 minutes
Add the mild curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the soy sauce and nimono simmer sauce, and stir to combine
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the boudin noir mixture
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately
